name: search_contracts
description: Search the internal contract database by party name, date range, or contract status. Returns a list of matching contract summaries including ID, parties, effective date, and current status. Does not return full contract text.

party_name.description: Name of one of the contracting parties to search for. Partial matches are supported. Leave blank to search without a party filter.

status.description: Filter by contract status. Use 'active' for contracts currently in force, 'expired' for contracts past their end date, 'draft' for unsigned contracts, or omit to return all statuses.

from_date.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD). Return only contracts with an effective date on or after this date. Optional.

to_date.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD). Return only contracts with an effective date on or before this date. Optional.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default is 10. Maximum is 50.
